channel.title: Agentic-Ai on VENANT 🐦
channel.description: Recent content in Agentic-Ai on VENANT 🐦

item.title: What is Agentic AI? The Shift from Passive to Active Intelligence
item.description:
Traditional AI operates like a library. You ask a question, and it provides information. Agentic AI functions like a partner. You provide a goal, and it executes the task. This shift from passive responses to active execution defines the current era of intelligence.

The Four Pillars of Agentic AI

Goal-Oriented Autonomy Instruction no longer requires rigid, step-by-step commands. Instead of manual directions—search for data, write a report, and send an email—you provide an objective. The agent determines the methods, tools, and timing necessary to achieve that target independently.
